title: DiodeExtension
description: Category extension for diodes (signal, switching, Schottky, zener, TVS, rectifier, bridge, varicap). Layered on top of base per spec §7. Version 1.0. Field union from 1N4148 (signal switching) + MBRS540T3G (Schottky power rectifier).

diode_type.description: Diode functional category. Drives which optional fields are typically populated (e.g. vz only for zener, trr null for slow rectifiers).

vf.description: Forward voltage drop (V). Multiple SpecValues per part when datasheet publishes at multiple If test currents. Condition string carries the test If (e.g. 'IF=10mA', 'iF=5A, TC=25°C').

if_max.description: Maximum forward current (A). Multiple SpecValues to disambiguate continuous (IF), average rectified (IF(AV)), and repetitive peak (IFRM) variants via condition string.

ifsm.description: Non-repetitive peak surge current (A). Single SpecValue per part typically. Condition carries pulse width or half-cycle spec.

vr_max.description: Maximum reverse voltage (V). Multiple SpecValues to disambiguate VRRM (peak repetitive), VR (DC blocking), and VRWM (working peak) via condition string.

breakdown_voltage.description: Reverse breakdown voltage V_BR (V). Distinct from vr_max — represents the measured avalanche threshold, not the maximum rated working voltage. Null when not explicitly specified.

ir.description: Reverse leakage current (A). Multiple SpecValues for different reverse voltage and junction temperature test conditions.

trr.description: Reverse recovery time (s). Most relevant for switching, signal, and Schottky diodes. Typically null for slow rectifiers and zeners.

cd.description: Junction capacitance (F). Condition carries reverse voltage and test frequency (e.g. 'VR=0V, f=1MHz'). Most relevant for varicap, signal, and switching diodes.

vz.description: Zener voltage (V). Null for all non-zener diode types. Condition carries test current Iz.

power_dissipation.description: Continuous power dissipation (W). Condition typically carries ambient temperature Ta or lead temperature TL.

tj_max.description: Maximum operating junction temperature (°C). Both min (storage lower bound) and max populated when datasheet specifies operating junction temperature range.

thermal_resistance.description: Thermal resistance characteristics. Through-hole parts typically have only rtheta_ja; SMD parts often have both rtheta_jl and rtheta_ja.

rtheta_ja.description: Junction-to-ambient thermal resistance (K/W). Condition may specify board conditions (e.g. 'Min pad', 'l=4mm, TL=constant').

rtheta_jc.description: Junction-to-case thermal resistance (K/W). Null when not specified.

rtheta_jl.description: Junction-to-lead thermal resistance (K/W). Common for SMD packages (e.g. SMC, SMA). Null for through-hole parts.

package.description: Package physical characteristics. body_mm uses nested object shape (Phase 3b option A convention — first schema establishing this precedent).

pin_count.description: Number of leads/pins. Typically 2 for diodes.

pitch_mm.description: Lead pitch in millimeters. Null when not applicable (through-hole axial parts).

body_mm.description: Package body dimensions in millimeters. Nested object per Phase 3b option A convention. Inner keys (length/width/height) align with base.schema.json's body_mm shape.

length.description: Body length in millimeters along the longest axis.

width.description: Body width in millimeters along the perpendicular-to-length axis.

height.description: Body height in millimeters (package thickness / standoff direction).

thermal_pad.description: True when the package has an exposed thermal pad on the bottom. Null when not determinable.

marking_code.description: Surface marking printed or molded on the package body (e.g. 'V4148' for 1N4148, 'B540' for MBRS540T3G). Null when part is unmarked or too small for marking.

polarity_marking_convention.description: How the cathode (or anode) is identified on the physical part (e.g. 'cathode band', 'polarity band on plastic body', 'K mark', 'flat side = cathode'). Null when not described.
